title: TFC xTended - Better and Tested
description: This is a 1.20 take of mine on a better TerraFirmaCraft :)
body:
# TerraFirmaCraft xTended - Better And Tested is the **ultimate modpack** for a **TFC experience** that you **wont forget**. Equiped with some **performance mods** and some **add-ons**, this **modpack** will provide you with **lots of fun!**
# I made this for 2 reasons mainly: - I felt like i should have a **personal take** on a TFC modpack - So far i checked nobody on Modrinth made a pack for TFC for **1.20(.1)**
Mods used - 3D Skin Layers by tr7zw -Architectury API by Architectury (team) -Barrels 2012 by eerussianguy -Cloth Config API by shedaniel -Collective by Serilum -Curios API by TheIllusiveC4 -Double Doors by Serilum -Dynamic FPS by juliand665 -Embeddium by embeddedt -Embeddium++ by SrRapero720 -Farmer's Delight by vectorwing -Farmer's Delight TFC by sirRobson -FerriteCore by malte0811 -ImmediatelyFast by RaphiMC -Jade Addons (Forge) by Snownee -Jade 🔍 by Snownee -Just Zoom by keksuccino -Konkrete by keksuccino -ModernFix by embeddedt -Mouse Tweaks by YaLTeR -Patchouli by Vazkii -Small Ships by talhanation -TerraFirmaCraft by eerussianguy -TerraFirmaShips by w8b40t -TexTrue's Embeddium Options by ThinkingStudio (Team) -Zume by Nolij
